channel.title: Heather Li | heatherhzli.com
channel.description: Recent content on Heather Li | heatherhzli.com

item.title: Projects
item.description: Here is a brief list of things that I currently am/have worked on. Genuinely thankful to have had these opportunities. I’m always open to more opportunities, so if anything I’ve worked on interests you, please feel free to get in touch! Currently I’m currently working primarily on independent projects and supporting speech in Oxford. My time is generally split between the following: Working on convening the Oxford Women and Gender Minorities’ Open, to be held in November 2023!

item.title: Water: Canada's Missing Human Right
item.description: An article I previously wrote for the Oxford Society of International Development, originally posted on February 28th, 2022.
